Hero.title: Shaolin Medicine Proven in Real Patients Since 1979
Hero.description1: Since 1979, YAPCHANKOR has treated chronic joint and muscle pain using a practical approach rooted in Shaolin injury medicine.

RollingHook.subtext: Many patients come to us after trying other treatments without lasting relief.
RollingHook.secondaryText: Our proprietary herbal formulation has been used in our clinics for decades and later inspired the PainFix topical pain relief range, now registered with Malaysia's Ministry of Health (KKM). Its anti-inflammatory properties were studied through laboratory research conducted with Monash University.

Differentiation.title: Built from Real Injuries — Not Just Theory
Differentiation.description: Shaolin medicine developed through treating sprains, tears, and chronic pain in real people. That practical tradition continues at YAPCHANKOR today.
Differentiation.transition: Rather than relying on one method alone, our treatment combines:

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Patients Choose Us
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: Not Just Physio. Not Just Chiropractic. Not Just TCM.
WhyChooseUs.description: Most clinics rely on a single method. At YAPCHANKOR, treatment combines multiple approaches shaped by Shaolin injury medicine and refined through decades of modern clinical practice.

ScientificProof.title: Scientifically Studied. Clinically Proven.
ScientificProof.description: Our proprietary herbal formulation has been used in clinical practice for decades and later inspired the PainFix topical pain relief range.
ScientificProof.monashStudy: Laboratory research conducted with Monash University studied its anti-inflammatory properties at the cellular level.
ScientificProof.finding3: measurable biological activity in lab testing
ScientificProof.graphicCaption: Laboratory research conducted with Monash University

Compatibility.title: Works Alongside Modern Medical Care
Compatibility.description: YAPCHANKOR treatment is often used alongside physiotherapy, medical treatment, and post-surgical rehabilitation.
Compatibility.support: Our role is not to replace other care, but to support recovery through an integrated approach.

ClinicalResults.title: Results in Real Patients
ClinicalResults.subtitle: Patients usually come after trying other treatments without lasting relief.

ProblemReframe.title: Resolving Pain at the Source
ProblemReframe.quote: Temporary relief is easy. Lasting resolution requires identifying the real driver of your chronic pain.
ProblemReframe.headline: Pain Relief Is Temporary. Resolution Requires A Method.
ProblemReframe.problemText: Most treatments focus on masking the immediate pain without addressing why it keeps returning.
ProblemReframe.standardText: Traditional approaches often rely on temporary suppression rather than functional resolution.
ProblemReframe.solutionText: A structured system designed to identify and treat the source, restoring long-term function.
ProblemReframe.benefit1Text: Many patients cycle through short-term fixes that only mask symptoms. We look deeper.
ProblemReframe.benefit2Text: YAPCHANKOR focuses on identifying the real driver of chronic pain through structured assessment.
ProblemReframe.benefit3Text: The goal is structured improvement and long-term resolution, not just surface-level management.

Method.title: The YAPCHANKOR Method
Method.subtitle: A Structured Path to Pain Resolution
Method.step1Text: A comprehensive evaluation to understand your pain history and functional limitations.
Method.step2Text: Pinpointing the exact driver of your chronic pain rather than just treating symptoms.
Method.step3Text: Combining expert manual therapy with our proprietary clinical herbal formulations.
Method.step4Text: A structured plan to restore function and ensure long-term recovery.

ClinicalFormulation.headline: From Heritage Formulation to Modern Clinical Support
ClinicalFormulation.description: Our clinical formulas have been used for decades to support patient recovery. Today, this heritage meets modern science through our PainFix range, bridging tradition and clinical validation.
ClinicalFormulation.heritageText: Rooted in centuries-old injury medicine, refined through clinical practice since 1979.
ClinicalFormulation.modernText: KKM-registered and studied for its anti-inflammatory properties.

ScientificValidation.headline: Scientific Validation Behind Clinical Practice
ScientificValidation.description: Our methods and formulations are backed by scientific research and collaborations with leading institutions.
ScientificValidation.monashText: Laboratory-linked research studying the anti-inflammatory activity of our formulations at the cellular level.
ScientificValidation.markerText: Significant reduction in biologically measurable anti-inflammatory markers observed in cellular studies.
ScientificValidation.recoveryText: Research supports the role of our clinical formulations in supporting natural tissue recovery processes.

Outcomes.headline: Real-World Outcomes
Outcomes.description: We treat a wide range of chronic conditions with a focus on functional improvement and long-term recovery.
Outcomes.condition1Result: Improved joint function and significant pain reduction.
Outcomes.condition2Problem: Acute or chronic spinal pain with nerve involvement.
Outcomes.condition2Result: Restored spinal mobility and relief from nerve symptoms.
Outcomes.condition3Problem: Stiffness and severe pain in the shoulder joint.
Outcomes.condition3Result: Restored range of motion and pain-free movement.

Branches.description: Visit us at any of our four clinical locations for a professional assessment and treatment.

Insights.headline: Insights from Clinical Practice
Insights.description: We regularly publish practical insights on chronic pain, recovery, and injury management based on decades of treating real patients.
Insights.article1_title: Why Chronic Pain Often Doesn’t Improve
Insights.article1_desc: Many cases persist when underlying structural and inflammatory causes remain unresolved.
Insights.article2_title: The Role of Inflammation in Tissue Healing
Insights.article2_desc: How managing localized inflammation is critical for long-term functional recovery.
Insights.article3_desc: Moving beyond symptomatic relief to address the physical source of discomfort.

FAQ.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to common questions about the YAPCHANKOR Method and our treatment approach.
FAQ.q1: How long is a typical treatment session?
FAQ.a1: A YAPCHANKOR treatment session typically lasts 60 to 90 minutes. This provides sufficient time for a comprehensive combination of manual therapy, clinical formulations, and functional assessment.
FAQ.q2: What is the cost of a clinical assessment?
FAQ.a2: Clinical assessments at YAPCHANKOR start from a competitive base rate tailored to the complexity of the evaluation. Please contact your nearest branch for the most accurate current pricing.
FAQ.q3: Do I need a referral to visit your clinic?
FAQ.a3: No medical referral is required to visit YAPCHANKOR. You can schedule your clinical assessment directly with any of our four branches without a prior doctor's letter.
FAQ.q4: How many sessions do I need for recovery?
FAQ.a4: Recovery timelines are personalized based on your specific condition and pain history. After your assessment, our clinicians will provide a structured recovery progression plan that outlines the expected number of sessions.

FinalCTA.headline: Start with a Proper Assessment
FinalCTA.description: Persistent or recurring pain often needs structured treatment rather than short-term relief.
FinalCTA.heritage: 传承少林伤科智慧，结合现代临床实践，自1979年。

hero.title: Our Method
hero.subtitle: Bridging Traditional Wisdom and Modern Clinical Science

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.text1: Since 1979, YAPCHANKOR has helped over 20,000 patients successfully, many with the most chronic muscle and joint problems like slipped discs, knee osteoarthritis, and frozen shoulders.
whoWeAre.text2: There is a real medical benefit in our medicine, which delivers the fastest, most efficient and cost-effective therapy for chronic muscle and joint pain today.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.intro: Modern medicine has produced many miracles in treating humanity's health problems. However, in the area of chronic muscle and joint pain, most treatments have significant downsides.
howItWorks.downside1: Modern painkillers block pain signals without treating the root cause, at the expense of severe side effects to your stomach or heart.
howItWorks.downside2: Many service providers like chiropractors, osteopaths, and physiotherapists provide some relief, but none of them provides a cure-all, and many are expensive for short-term relief.
howItWorks.solution: We believe we have a better solution. By combining a unique Shaolin Herbal Medicine, which helps reduce inflammation and boosts healing, together with modern physiotherapy, we have produced better results for chronic pain patients in a faster time frame.

whyItWorks.title: Why It Works
whyItWorks.science: While Traditional Chinese Medicine is often treated skeptically, many Chinese herbs have been studied rigorously. Our special formula has been shown to have positive benefits like anti-inflammation and regenerative properties.
whyItWorks.evidence: In the area of chronic pain, there is no deceiving the patient. We use objective ways to measure pain levels and improvements in functional movement, ensuring the treatment is truly working.
whyItWorks.placebo: Even the placebo effect, as strong as it is, cannot produce a long-term cure. Our methods focus on measurable biological activity and functional recovery.

history.title: A Proud History
history.text: YAPCHANKOR brings natural and non-surgical relief with our therapeutic exercises, sports injury patches and proprietary medicines. These target every part of the tissue recovery process, whether back or knee pains, sports injuries, or muscle and joint pains.
history.linkTitle: Ancient Wisdom Meets Modern Clinical Science
history.heritage: The study of medicine and martial arts were very closely linked in ancient China. Martial arts teachers needed a knowledge of anatomy and first aid.
history.ancestor: It was YAPCHANKOR's ancestor, Yap Feng Qi, who trained at the Shaolin Temple in the early 20th century and learned their secret formulas for the treatment of external injuries.
history.migration: From 1916 to 1930, his descendants moved to Malaya to teach kung-fu, including Yap Chan Kor’s father, Yap Shu Shen, who became the grandmaster of the Chin Woo Stadium, training and treating people for over 50 years.
history.founding: A revered healer, he passed on his teachings to his son, Yap Chan Kor, who established Tabib Yap Chan Kor in 1979.
history.conclusion: Today, we blend ancient Chinese medicine and techniques with the use of trained physiotherapists, bringing forth this long tradition with modern assessments to ensure faster and long-term recovery.
